name: piper-tts-rest-api
description: Convert markdown files to audio using text-to-speech with Piper

scripts.start: node --import ./dist/instrumentation.js dist/server.js # ⚠️ The OpenTelemetry SDK is NOT imported in `server.ts`. It is bootstrapped via Node's `--import ./dist/instrumentation.js` flag so that the SDK starts in a preload phase BEFORE this module's `import` statements are evaluated. That ordering is required for `@opentelemetry/instrumentation-http` to monkey-patch `node:http` before we hand `createHttpServer` a route handler. A regular side-effect import here would not work: ESM hoists every `import` in a module to the top of its evaluation phase, so `node:http` would be resolved (and its exports captured) before `instrumentation.js`'s body — and thus `sdk.start()` — ever runs.

author: Kasir Barati
